Name: Facet for SolidWorks
Author: SW Robotics
Description: Context-aware SolidWorks commands on your Stream Deck. The deck follows you — Part, Sketch, Assembly, and Drawing tools appear automatically as you work.

Actions.Name: Facet Key
Actions.Tooltip: A context-aware SolidWorks key. Place this on every key of your MK.2; Facet decides what each one does based on what you're doing in SolidWorks.
